description.ko: 유기적 막과 액체 빛이 무중력의 호흡하는 환경 속에서 하나로 어우러지는 생명의 상호 연결된 파동을 표현합니다.
description.en: A representation of the interconnected pulse of life, where organic membranes and liquid light merge in a weightless, breathing environment.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Bioluminescent Weaver.' A vast, living network of #7FB069 emerald moss-like membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. The entity exhales thick, rhythmic ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light that weave like glowing silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on the intricate internal capillary systems and glowing sap channels. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, featuring hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture the breathing organic flow.
